data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a full audit trail.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of a full audit trail for who delegated what and when. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or details related to the audit trail, nor does it confirm that such a feature is implemented or validated in the current saga run. The linked use case outlines the need for this audit trail but lacks concrete evidence that it is being tracked or recorded, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of a full audit trail for delegation actions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the audit trail for delegation.
